user_input:
[form answers — task-type]
- What should I build?: Prototype
- Who is this for?: mvp for starting alpha test
- Brand context: Pick a direction for me [value: pick_direction]
- Roughly how much?: about 8 forms(landing, view of expenses(groups in sidebar),  creation of expense, invitation window, auth/login, settle up page, settings page)
- Any important constraints?: reference splitwise in ergonomic, but my app must bee cooler and more ergonomic, less complicated, more beautiful

todos.content: Create shared styles.css with design tokens, components, responsive system
Create index.html launcher linking all 8 screens
Create auth.html — login/signup screen
Create landing.html — marketing/onboarding screen
Create expenses.html — main dashboard with groups sidebar
Create new-expense.html — expense creation form
Create scan-receipt.html — receipt scanning via camera/gallery
Create invite.html — invitation by QR code or email
Create settle-up.html — settle up balances page
Create settings.html — settings page
Self-check: 5-dim critique + anti-slop audit
